contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: dao-client release flow documented + npm-token expiry hardened; Sophia notified
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/74
  
  Details:
  Made the auto-publish flow durable + the token-expiry proactive (dao_protocol PR #74). README 'Publishing (automatic)' now documents: release = bump version → merge (CI publishes if new, smoke-test-gated), plus an explicit npm-token section (expires ~2026-09-06, lives ONLY as the NPM_TOKEN GH Actions secret — never on a server or in chat — governor-only rotation). The publish step prints a clear 'token likely expired → rotate' hint on failure. Added npm-token-health.yml: a weekly npm whoami that fails loudly so expiry is caught BEFORE it blocks a release; triggered it once to validate (success — token healthy). Notified Sophia of the bump-and-merge flow + the token rules via ping_sophia. Rotation remains tracked in OPEN_FOLLOWUPS (~2026-09-06).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 33.33

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
